notes: ready‚Üíworking‚Üíready for a tool-less agy turn. The terminal signal is an EMPTY MODEL/PLANNER_RESPONSE (no tool_calls) which parser.parsePlannerResponse maps to turn_done. Antigravity emits no final terminal-TEXT message, but the scenario accepts any adapter-specific end signal; state reaches ready. Tokens/cost are not in the JSONL (SQLite-only) so cost/tokens are asserted absent. Single-birth adapter: session_id = <conv-id> dir from launch; anchor birth UNPINNED to start.
